```{.tikz}
\newcommand{\hextri}[2]{%
\begin{scope}[shift={#1}]
\foreach \i in {1,...,6} {
\coordinate (v\i) at ({(\i-1)*60+30}:0.5);
}
\draw[white] (v1)--(v2)--(v3)--(v4)--(v5)--(v6)--cycle;
\foreach \a/\b in {#2} {
\draw[white] (v\a)--(v\b);
}
\end{scope}
}
\begin{tikzpicture}
\hextri{(0,0)}{1/3,1/4,1/5};
\draw (0,0) circle (5pt);
\end{tikzpicture}

```
